MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up on Cross-Complaint Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Andrew Wanger, Esq. for Cross-Plaintiff: M-J SF Investments, LLC.
Cross-Plaintiff's witness: Maryanne Diaz, was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Break down of Attorney's Fees and Costs---------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Cross-Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Cross-Defendant: Lynn Otero, as follows:
Principal $56,431.99
Prejudgment Interest $9,013.18
Attorney's Fees $31,635.00
Costs $1,276.75, for a total of $98,356.92
Judgment signed in open court.
